## Summary

- What changed?
- Why was this change needed?

## Scope

- Backend
- Frontend
- Infrastructure / CI
- Docs / Planning artifacts

## Validation

- `client`: `npm run lint`
- `client`: `npm run build`
- `server`: `npm test`
- `server`: `npm run build`
- Manual smoke checks done (if needed)

## Security and Compliance

- No secrets committed
- Auth/RBAC impact reviewed
- PII handling impact reviewed

## Rollback Plan

- How can this be reverted quickly if needed?

## Notes for Reviewers

- Known trade-offs, limitations, or follow-up items.
